visual_summary: A component displaying an image with a grid, which becomes more pronounced and turns grayscale when an animation occurs, suitable for showcasing grid-based images.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready image component with the following characteristics:

Name: Pixel Image Demo
Description: A component displaying an image with a grid, which becomes more pronounced and turns grayscale when an animation occurs, suitable for showcasing grid-based images.
Style: grayscale
Interactions: animated
Tags: image, grid

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { PixelImage } from "@/registry/magicui/pixel-image"

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <PixelImage
      src="/pixel-image-demo.jpg"
      customGrid={{ rows: 4, cols: 6 }}
      grayscaleAnimation
    />
  )
}
